content: Supabase RLS multi-tenant testing: test policies via the client SDK (not the SQL Editor, which bypasses RLS as service role). Programmatic test pattern: BEGIN; SET LOCAL role='authenticated'; SET LOCAL request.jwt.claims='{"sub":"user-uuid"}'; run query; ROLLBACK. For app-level testing, seed two real tenant accounts and assert cross-tenant reads/writes return zero rows (not an error) when policy denies access.
